'''thoshalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:icefree|icefree]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:icefree|icefree]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thoshalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thoshalithi|thoshalithi]] || [[word:thoshaliji|thoshaliji]] || [[word:thoshalishi|thoshalishi]] || [[word:thoshaliki|thoshaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thoshaluthuthu|thoshaluthuthu]] || [[word:thoshalujuju|thoshalujuju]] || [[word:thoshalushushu|thoshalushushu]] || [[word:thoshalukuku|thoshalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshaluthu|thoshaluthu]] || [[word:thoshaluju|thoshaluju]] || [[word:thoshalushu|thoshalushu]] || [[word:thoshaluku|thoshaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshalufthuf|thoshalufthuf]] || [[word:thoshalufjuf|thoshalufjuf]] || [[word:thoshalufshuf|thoshalufshuf]] || [[word:thoshalufkuf|thoshalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thoshalethe|thoshalethe]] || [[word:thoshaleje|thoshaleje]] || [[word:thoshaleshe|thoshaleshe]] || [[word:thoshaleke|thoshaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thoshalothotho|thoshalothotho]] || [[word:thoshalojojo|thoshalojojo]] || [[word:thoshaloshosho|thoshaloshosho]] || [[word:thoshalokoko|thoshalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshalotho|thoshalotho]] || [[word:thoshalojo|thoshalojo]] || [[word:thoshalosho|thoshalosho]] || [[word:thoshaloko|thoshaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshalofthof|thoshalofthof]] || [[word:thoshalofjof|thoshalofjof]] || [[word:thoshalofshof|thoshalofshof]] || [[word:thoshalofkof|thoshalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfthĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfjĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfshĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfkĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfthĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfjĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfshĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfkĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfthĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfjĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfshĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thoshalĂŻfkĂŻf|thoshalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thoshalĂŠthĂŠ|thoshalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thoshalĂŠjĂŠ|thoshalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thoshalĂŠshĂŠ|thoshalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thoshalĂŠkĂŠ|thoshalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thoshalathatha|thoshalathatha]] || [[word:thoshalajaja|thoshalajaja]] || [[word:thoshalashasha|thoshalashasha]] || [[word:thoshalakaka|thoshalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshalatha|thoshalatha]] || [[word:thoshalaja|thoshalaja]] || [[word:thoshalasha|thoshalasha]] || [[word:thoshalaka|thoshalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshalafthaf|thoshalafthaf]] || [[word:thoshalafjaf|thoshalafjaf]] || [[word:thoshalafshaf|thoshalafshaf]] || [[word:thoshalafkaf|thoshalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thoshalasha|thoshalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thoshalshĂ«sha|thoshalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thoshalrosha|thoshalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thoshalmusha|thoshalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thoshalyasha|thoshalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothoshalnkshĂ«sha|gothoshalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothoshalnkrosha|gothoshalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothoshalnkmusha|gothoshalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothoshalnkyasha|gothoshalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thoshashalasha|thoshashalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thoshashalshĂ«sha|thoshashalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thoshashalrosha|thoshashalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thoshashalmusha|thoshashalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thoshashalyasha|thoshashalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothoshashalnkshĂ«sha|gothoshashalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothoshashalnkrosha|gothoshashalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothoshashalnkmusha|gothoshashalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothoshashalnkyasha|gothoshashalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:theshĂŠlasha|theshĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:theshĂŠlshĂ«sha|theshĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:theshĂŠlrosha|theshĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:theshĂŠlmusha|theshĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:theshĂŠlyasha|theshĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotheshĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gotheshĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotheshĂŠlnkrosha|gotheshĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotheshĂŠlnkmusha|gotheshĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotheshĂŠlnkyasha|gotheshĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thoshfalasha|thoshfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thoshfalshĂ«sha|thoshfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thoshfalrosha|thoshfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thoshfalmusha|thoshfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thoshfalyasha|thoshfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothoshfalnkshĂ«sha|gothoshfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothoshfalnkrosha|gothoshfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothoshfalnkmusha|gothoshfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothoshfalnkyasha|gothoshfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
